chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.78 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.1688/2026 2. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 02.02.2026 Mr. Basam Ali Dahri, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the instant criminal miscellaneous application at some length, does not press the same and intends to file direct complaint before the concerned Court. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
